'''Dirneele''' was a dancer who worked in a noisy club in [[Tindark]], one of the [[Platform city|platform cities]] of [[Cularin/Legends|Cularin]]. She had dark hair and eyes, but used wigs and eye implants to change her appearance for her performances. In [[31 BBY/Legends|31 BBY]], she longed to find a better job or at least a better club, but was under contract until [[29 BBY/Legends|29 BBY]]. She usually knew what was going on in Tindark's underworld.

{{Char-stub}}
